sub_pixel_system.notes: RTS game - sub-pixel movement data not documented in available sources

tier_notes: StarCraft: Brood War is a real-time strategy game, not a platformer. The provided Wikipedia source contains no movement physics, gravity, jump, or sub-pixel system data. Such detailed physics parameters are not applicable to RTS games which focus on unit pathfinding and tactical movement rather than character jump mechanics. Movement is controlled at the strategy level through unit commands and AI pathfinding.
sources_used: wikipedia - StarCraft: Brood War article (gameplay overview only)
